Macro 2h ago
Fed Signals Potential Rate Cut in Q3 2026
Federal Reserve officials hinted at possible rate adjustments amid cooling inflation data, boosting equity markets.
Earnings 4h ago
NVIDIA Posts Record Revenue, Beats Estimates by 12%
AI chip demand drives NVDA to $26.2B quarterly revenue, sending shares up 6% after hours.
Sector 6h ago
Tech Sector Outperforms Amid Rotation from Bonds
Growth stocks rally as Treasury yields stabilize, with XLK gaining 2.1% on the session.
Commodity 8h ago
Oil Pulls Back on Inventory Build, Energy Stocks Slide
WTI crude drops 1.8% after EIA reports larger-than-expected crude build, pressuring XLE.
Global 10h ago
China PMI Beats Expectations, Global Markets Rally
Manufacturing activity surprises to the upside, lifting emerging market ETFs and industrial stocks.
Economic 12h ago
Retail Sales Miss Forecast, Consumer Stocks Under Pressure
February retail sales decline 0.4%, missing the +0.3% consensus estimate.
